description: ElastiCache Overprovisioning Detection Rules — Identifies waste from excess replica/shard nodes in clusters whose cache hit rate shows no memory pressure

cost.note: ElastiCache On-Demand pricing per node per hour (us-east-1). Each node in a replication group is billed independently.

severity_rules.name: excess_node_count
severity_rules.description: 30-day average cache hit rate is at or above 99% with more than 2 nodes. A high hit rate under excess node count indicates no memory pressure — the cluster can serve traffic with 2 nodes (minimum for automatic_failover_enabled), eliminating redundant nodes.
